heading: Same; parliamentary procedure at joint session
label: 18 Same; parliamentary procedure at joint session
text: While the two Houses shall be in session as provided in this chapter, the President of the Senate shall have power to preserve order; and no debate shall be allowed and no question shall be put by the presiding officer except to either House on a motion to withdraw under section 15(d)(2)(C)(i).
notes: Amendments2022—, substituted “session” for “meeting” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 117–328, § 110(c)(2), inserted “under section 15(d)(2)(C)(i)” after “motion to withdraw”.Pub. L. 117–328, § 110(b)1954—Act , substituted “chapter” for “subchapter”.Sept. 3, 1954
amendments: Amendments2022—, substituted “session” for “meeting” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 117–328, § 110(c)(2), inserted “under section 15(d)(2)(C)(i)” after “motion to withdraw”.Pub. L. 117–328, § 110(b)1954—Act , substituted “chapter” for “subchapter”.Sept. 3, 1954
